summary: Rapid Response Restoration expanded its service area to include Charlotte, NC, and updated its emergency routing rules, special rules, and greeting to reflect this change.

memo_field_changes.new_value: Rapid Response Restoration, serving Atlanta and Charlotte

new_items: do not reference Encircle to callers
flag if caller says the property is vacant or abandoned
call Jerome directly at 404-555-0612 if caller says FEMA or federal disaster declaration

added: ask for city and zip code early in the call to determine market
flag if caller says the property is vacant or abandoned
call Jerome directly at 404-555-0612 if caller says FEMA or federal disaster declaration

new_rules_added: ask for city and zip code early in the call to determine market
flag if caller says the property is vacant or abandoned
call Jerome directly at 404-555-0612 if caller says FEMA or federal disaster declaration
integration_updates: do not reference Encircle to callers
special_rules_updates: note if caller says it's a rental property
flag if caller says the property is vacant or abandoned
call Jerome directly at 404-555-0612 if caller says FEMA or federal disaster declaration
greeting_new_value: Rapid Response Restoration, serving Atlanta and Charlotte
